group.name: SA Accounting — Engagement Details
group.description: South African accounting-specific fields for engagement (project) entities

fields.name: Tax Year
fields.description: Relevant tax year (e.g., 2026) for tax return engagements

fields.name: SARS Submission Deadline
fields.description: Filing deadline based on engagement type and financial year-end

fields.name: Assigned Reviewer
fields.description: Senior person who reviews deliverables before client delivery

fields.name: Complexity
fields.description: Engagement complexity level for planning and billing
